action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 23 train_fp.py crashed because mol_utils.py tried Chem.Bond() (not instantiable). Analysis: RDKit's Bond cannot be directly instantiated; must use Chem.RWMol() to build molecules. Fix mol_utils.py to construct molecules via RWMol, correctly adding atoms (atomic number from node features) and bonds (mapping bond_type from edge_attr to RDKit bond types). Then train MLP on Morgan fingerprints (2048 bits) to get stable baseline above 0.025. Decision: Rewrite mol_utils.py with correct atom/bond construction, write train_fp.py for fingerprint computation and training on full dataset, train 30 epochs, save best checkpoint, and submit eval immediately. This avoids all segfault sources and should yield first meaningful AP within remaining time (2.68h).
